title: Get to Know Me
text: I’m a developer passionate about creating digital solutions that make a difference. I build websites and mobile apps with a focus on simplicity, performance, and usability. I enjoy solving problems, learning new technologies, and bringing ideas to life through code.

section.title: Why Antd?
section.content: Ant Design is a React UI library that has a lot of easy-to-use components for building elegant UI.

section.title: Why styled-components?
section.content: Styled Components gives you total control over your components.
